install: mkdir -p "$HOME/bin" && ln -sf "$(command -v python3)" "$HOME/bin/python" && export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt && python3 -m app.mobile_cloud_access --status || true
start: export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH"; python3 -m app.mobile_cloud_access --status; if python3 -c "from app.dropbox_workspace import has_dropbox_credentials; raise SystemExit(0 if has_dropbox_credentials() else 1)"; then python3 -m app.mobile_cloud_access --bootstrap || true; fi
